function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
---
Hi Nina,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 2026-02-08 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) as an attachment.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write appears valid: recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email, single attachment was read and ordering constraint is satisfied for one item, and subject quoting is YAML-safe. Next finalize inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Prepared outbound record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md for Nina with the requested 2026-02-08 invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: oldest inbox message processed, outbound draft created, inbox item deleted.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing a resend email draft to Nina Schreiber with the requested Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH invoice dated 2026-02-08 attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox file shape, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical inbox header showed sender nina@finance-workflow.example; canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/nina.md confirms this as Nina Schreiber’s primary_contact_email. Requested invoice details (date 2026-02-08 and Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) matched the exact finance record 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md. An outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox with that exact file as attachment, then the processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.
